name: logging design: the toolchain provisions an observability analysis stack grounded in OpenTelemetry
command:
printf '{"platform":"aws","iac_targets":["terraform"]}' > h.json
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/toolchain-advisor.sh" --handoff h.json --out tc.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const t=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("tc.json","utf8"));const o=t.recommendations.find(r=>r.category==="observability");process.exit(o&&o.tool==="opentelemetry"&&o.source_id==="opentelemetry-docs"?0:1)' && echo analysis-stack 1>&2
